title: Stone Lucky Block
description: A Stone Lucky Block that has Custom Item Drops!
body:
> **The Stone Lucky Block mod Adds:**
> 
> - New Cobblestone Armor
> - Stone Greatsword
> - A Stone Lucky Block
> - A Stone Apple
> - A Stone Potion
> 
> **How to get started:** You can craft a Stone Lucky Block with 4 Stone and a chest (Full Recipe in Gallery) Or You can find it rarely generating in caves or on mountains!
> 
> **How to get the custom items:** To get all the mods new Items you have to break The Stone Lucky Block and it drops vanilla or new Custom Items!
> 
>  **Credits:**
> - If you use this mod in a modpack please Credit me!
>
